content.full_text:
November 6, 1990

Mr. John H. Larson, Chairman  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 J Street, Suite 800  
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Mr. Larson:

In view of the recent decision regarding Proposition 73 and the stay on Proposition 68, are recipient committees, such as this organization, still bound to donation limitations?

Although chartered by the Los Angeles County Democratic Central Committee, we operate as an umbrella group for all the Democratic clubs and individual Democrats in the San Fernando Valley. In other words, we operate as a quasi-legal extension of the California Democratic Party.

As such, we have been abiding by the donation limitations as established by the Fair Political Practices Commission in its Information Manual C for General Purpose Recipient Committees. Pending a decision by the Court in regard to Proposition 68, can we disregard the limitations established in Information Manual C?

We realize that matters are in a state of flux in regard to the above information; however, we would appreciate an answer as soon as possible.

Sincerely,

Charles Knutsen  
Charles Knutsen, Chair
